positive: A whimsical, symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent deep-sea creatures and cosmic constellations, forming a central mandala composition. Include intricate glowing tentacles, stylized deep-sea flora (anemones, coral), and floating geometric stellar elements. The style should be a blend of detailed scientific illustration and ethereal cosmic art, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a limited color palette of sapphire blue, electric teal, deep indigo, and glowing lime green. Perfect for textile printing, with defined edges and graphic clarity. Ultra detail, high contrast, elegant, symmetry.
